text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "Self-Rewarding Language Models" is real but was authored by Weizhe Yuan, Richard Yuanzhe Pang, Kyunghyun Cho, Sainbayar Sukhbaatar, Jing Xu, and Jason Weston (arXiv:2401.10020, 2024). The cited authors — Daniel Ziegler, Long Ouyang, Jeffrey Wu, Ryan Lowe, et al. — are completely different from the real authors, and the cited arXiv ID (2210.01152) points to an unrelated paper on general relativity. This is a classic hallucination: a real paper title grafted onto fabricated metadata.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2401.10020
